hero.subtitle: Drag & drop your HTML game and the world can play it. No domain. No server. No deploy knowledge.

searchChanged.subtitle: 68% of vibe coders finish their game but never share it. The reasons are always the same three.
searchChanged.problem1Desc: Terminal, git push, build config — 4.5 hours to first deploy on average. 73% give up along the way.
searchChanged.problem2Desc: Domain purchase, DNS setup, SSL, hosting. 4 steps required, $20–50 per year.
searchChanged.problem3Desc: Personal domains don't rank in search. Social link CTR is under 2%. The game stays unknown.
searchChanged.closing: AI built the game, but didn't teach how to ship it.

mission.text1: We're building a space where creators and players meet — creators deploy in 3 seconds, players discover new games with a single swipe.
mission.text2: A world that needs no domain, no server, no deploy knowledge — fewer barriers, lower cost, more players.

solution.feature1Desc: Drag & drop an HTML file and get a playable link in 3 seconds. 99% less time than traditional deployment.
solution.feature2Desc: Thumbnail, description, and controls page are auto-generated. No domain needed, zero cost.
solution.feature3Desc: Swipe like TikTok for new games. 30-second rounds, then swipe again. Uploaded games instantly enter the feed.
solution.feature4Desc: No review, no waiting. Instant listing on upload. 12x average plays compared to self-hosting.

cta.subtitle:
Sign up in 30 seconds. Upload in 3 seconds. Cost: $0.
There's no reason your game should stay on your computer.

about.title: About GameDrop
about.subtitle: A space where anyone can create, share, and play games
about.whatWeBuildDesc: GameDrop is a platform where you can upload HTML games and play them directly in the browser. Publish games with drag & drop — no installation needed — and share them with players worldwide.
about.instantPublishDesc: Upload a file and it's playable immediately
about.bothFormsDesc: From quick casual games to deep experiences
about.safeExecDesc: All games run in an isolated sandbox
about.freeDesc: Free to upload and free to play
about.contactDesc: For suggestions, inquiries, or partnerships, email {{email}}.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Have questions or suggestions? Feel free to reach out.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.sec1Intro: GameDrop collects the following personal information to provide our service.
privacy.sec1UseVal: Game play history, likes/saves, uploaded game files and metadata
privacy.sec1AutoVal: IP address, browser type and version, access timestamp, cookie data
privacy.sec2Item1: Account management: identity verification, login, access control
privacy.sec2Item2: Service delivery: game upload/publish, play history, likes/saves
privacy.sec2Item3: Service improvement: usage analytics, quality enhancement
privacy.sec2Item4: Advertising: personalized ads via Google AdSense (see Section 5)
privacy.sec2Item5: Abuse prevention: blocking malicious uploads, detecting abnormal access
privacy.sec3Intro: GameDrop deletes personal data promptly upon account deletion or when the collection purpose is fulfilled. Data required by law is retained for the legally mandated period.
privacy.sec3Item1: Usage records: deleted immediately upon account deletion
privacy.sec4Body: Personal data is deleted without delay once its purpose has been fulfilled or the retention period has expired. Electronic files are deleted using irreversible methods; paper documents are shredded or incinerated.
privacy.sec5Intro: GameDrop displays ads through Google AdSense. Google and third-party ad networks may use cookies to show interest-based ads.
privacy.sec5Item1: Google uses DoubleClick cookies to display relevant ads based on your browsing history.
privacy.sec5Item2Before: You can opt out of personalized ads at
privacy.sec5Item3Before: To opt out of third-party ad cookies, visit
privacy.sec6Body: GameDrop does not share personal information with third parties without consent, except as required by law. Cookie-based data may be passed to Google AdSense for advertising purposes, limited to the scope described in Section 5.
privacy.sec7Intro: You may exercise the following rights at any time:
privacy.sec7Item1: Request access, correction, or deletion of your personal data
privacy.sec7Item3: Delete your data by deleting your account
privacy.sec7Outro: Requests can be submitted via the contact information below and will be handled promptly.
privacy.effectiveDate: This Privacy Policy is effective as of April 9, 2026. Changes will be announced via site notices.

terms.title: Terms of Service
terms.sec1Body: These Terms govern the conditions and procedures for using GameDrop's ("the Service") HTML game upload and play service, and define the rights and obligations between users and the Service.
terms.sec2Item3: Game likes, saves, and play history management
terms.sec3Item1: Do not upload content that infringes on others' copyrights.
terms.sec3Item2: Do not upload files containing malware, phishing, or security threats.
terms.sec3Item3: Do not engage in activities that disrupt the normal operation of the Service.
terms.sec3Item4: Do not collect or misuse other users' personal information.
terms.sec4Body: Uploaded games are reviewed before publication. The Service may remove or reject content that violates these Terms without prior notice. Uploaders will be notified of the reason for rejection.
terms.sec5Body: Copyright for uploaded games remains with the uploader. GameDrop holds a non-exclusive license to display and distribute uploaded content for service provision purposes.
terms.sec6Body: The Service is not responsible for content uploaded by users. The Service is not liable for damages caused by service outages, data loss, or other force majeure events.
terms.sec7Body: These Terms may be updated as needed. Changes will be announced via the site. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.
terms.effectiveDate: These Terms of Service are effective as of April 9, 2026.

seo.defaultTitle: GameDrop - HTML Game Upload & Play Platform
seo.defaultDesc: Upload HTML games with drag & drop and play them instantly in your browser. Shortform swipe, longform browse, free game publishing platform.
seo.shortsDesc: Swipe through HTML games like TikTok. Shortform browser games under 5 minutes.
seo.gamesDesc: Explore HTML browser games by category. Action, puzzle, RPG, simulation and more free web games.
seo.searchDesc: Search for HTML browser games on GameDrop. Find games by title, category, or tags.
seo.uploadDesc: Upload HTML game files with drag & drop. Publish games for free — no server, no domain needed.
seo.aboutDesc: GameDrop is a platform where anyone can upload and publish HTML games for free.

pageHeading.shortsLead: Swipe through quick HTML games under 5 minutes
pageHeading.gamesLead: Explore free HTML games by category — action, puzzle, RPG and more
pageHeading.searchLead: Find games by title, category, or tags
